---
name: 🤩 New feature
about: Create a request about a new feature
labels: type:Task, platform:Web, status:New
---

## New feature

### Describe your request

A clear and concise description of the feature you want to see in Indigo Studio.

### Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to have.

### Project / workflow context

- Add this issue to the `launchops` project.
- If work will happen in code, plan for one issue = one branch/worktree = one PR.
- If this feature creates a narrow follow-up, open a child issue instead of broadening the original scope.

### Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your request.

### Additional context

Add any other context about the request here.
